Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMY CHAMBERLIN'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT. Appearances: Stuart A. Shanus of Reed Smith, LLP (310.734.5240) for defendant and responding party; Robert. B. Hancock of Pacific Justice Center (310.1940) for plaintiff and moving party. This matter was not argued and the court ruled as follows: Granted. On agreement of counsel, the deadline for opt-outs is 60 days from notice of the settlement agreement. Order signed in open court. Final approval hearing will be January 31, 2011. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Candace Yount, CSR #2737
